sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE 1717 REAR COVER, part number MKK-200100, supplied by ㈜동남엔지니어링 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier approval package containing revision history, material list, QC process chart, post-processing coating conditions, and product inspection criteria.
keyPoints: Applicable models are G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
The material list identifies AL(7075), Non-Chromate surface treatment, MG 751 primer, and CT20-K17-51121 top coat.

The QC process chart is marked for mass production and includes incoming inspection, CNC machining, cleaning, Cromate/Non Cromate processing, masking, primer coating, top coating, final inspection, and packaging.
Product inspection criteria include appearance, color, dimensions, fit, weight, reliability, and other mutually agreed criteria.
Reliability inspection references ISO 2409 and ASTM D3359.

concepts.name: Non-use certificate for restricted substances
concepts.evidence: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet for BLUE 1717 REAR COVER.
evidence.evidenceText: 승 인 원 [Approval Sheet] 제품명(PRODUCT NAME),,,,,,,BLUE 1717 REAR COVER

evidence.claim: The part or model number is MKK-200100.
The approval sheet applies to models G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: 적용 모델(MODEL NO) : G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, G1717FWP

evidence.claim: The QC process chart is revision 0 and dated 2025.07.04.
The raw material list includes AL(7075), Non-Chromate, MG 751, and CT20-K17-51121.
The material list includes non-use certificate columns for Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, and PBDE.
evidence.evidenceText: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The QC process chart is marked for mass production.
evidence.evidenceText: □ 시작품 Pilot ... □ 선행 양산 Pre-Prod. ... ■ 양 산 Mass-Prod.

evidence.claim: Incoming inspection requires no cracks, bubbles, foreign matter, or corrosion for appearance.
evidence.evidenceText: 수입검사 ... 외관,"크랙, 기포, 이물질, 부식 없을 것"

evidence.claim: Final inspection includes appearance, fit, CTQ dimensions, TAP specification, weight, and calibration checks.
evidence.evidenceText: 60,,○,,출하검사 ... 외관 ... 형합 ... V/C,CTQ ... TAP 게이지 ... CAS 전자저울,CTQ,무게,735 ± 40 g ... 계측기,,교정검사

evidence.claim: Packaging specifies individual foam sheet wrapping, individual bubble bag, product labels, and 10 pieces per box.
evidence.evidenceText: 70,,○,,포장 ... 1차 포장,발포지 포장(개별) ... 2차 포장,Bubble bag (개별) ... 개별 현품표 부착 ... 박스 당 10개씩 포장할 것

evidence.claim: Primer coating uses Musashi MG 751 white with natural drying for 10 minutes.
evidence.evidenceText: 50-1,,○,,Primer 도장 ... 도료,무사시 MG 751 (KOR) 화이트 ... 건조 온도,자연건조 ... 건조 시간,10분

evidence.claim: Top coating uses Musashi CT20-K17-51121 silver with 160℃ drying for 30 minutes.
Product inspection criteria include appearance, color, dimensions, fit, weight, reliability, and other criteria by mutual agreement.
Reliability inspection references ISO 2409 and ASTM D3359.

reviewFlags.reason: No governmental regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; authoritySignal is general and the document appears to be a customer-supplier approval package.
Multiple dates appear in the source, including 2025.04.17 and 2025.07.04; 2025.07.04 is used as the document date because it appears as the approval/revision date.
OCR/table extraction contains repeated headers, comma-separated spreadsheet artifacts, and some inconsistent spellings such as Cromate/Non Cromate.
The top coat condition table has a section header CT20-K22-51042 while other material and process entries identify CT20-K17-51121; this may require source file verification.
